Predictor variable names for the dataset neanderthal

Source: R/neanderthal.R
neanderthal_predictors.Rd

Character vector of 25 predictor variable names from neanderthal.

Usage

data(neanderthal_predictors)

Format

A character vector of length 25.

See also

Other neanderthal: neanderthal, neanderthal_extra(), neanderthal_response

Examples

data(neanderthal_predictors)
neanderthal_predictors
#>  [1] "bio1"                 "bio10"                "bio11"               
#>  [4] "bio12"                "bio13"                "bio14"               
#>  [7] "bio15"                "bio16"                "bio17"               
#> [10] "bio18"                "bio19"                "bio2"                
#> [13] "bio3"                 "bio4"                 "bio5"                
#> [16] "bio6"                 "bio7"                 "bio8"                
#> [19] "bio9"                 "topo_aspect"          "topo_diversity_local"
#> [22] "topo_diversity"       "topo_elev"            "topo_slope"          
#> [25] "topo_wetness"
